title: parseQuery
goal: Create src/query.mjs exporting function parseQuery(qs): parse a URL query string (optional leading "?") into an object; a repeated key collapses to an array; values are percent-decoded; a key with no "=" maps to "".
notes: Golden must stress: leading "?", a repeated key -> array, a percent-encoded value (e.g. %20), and a bare key -> "". Visible can test "a=1&b=2".
